kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: At most one member of the River Ward goes with (Barrels or Horseshoes).
Between Barrels and Horseshoes, one goes with Potter and the other with Bridgegate.
The artisan who makes Candles' levy is between Matilda and the artisan in Highrow.
Between Barrels and Eastcheap, one goes with Rowan and the other with Chisel.
The Tanner's levy is at least 2 coins more than the artisan who makes Candles.
Weaver goes with at least one of Hammer or Oldwall.
5 coins goes with exactly four of Wulfric, Fletcher, Anvil, Horseshoes, and Eastcheap.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: At most one member of the East Watershed goes with (Corn or Nightcrawler).
Between Corn and Nightcrawler, one goes with Catfish and the other with Birchpool.
The angler fishing with Dough's weight is between Esther and the angler at Grayreach.
Between Corn and Foxglen, one goes with Mabel and the other with Spinnerbait.
The angler who landed the Pike's weight is at least 2 lb more than the angler fishing with Dough.
Trout goes with at least one of Spoon or Pinehollow.
14 lb goes with exactly four of Wade, Bass, Popper, Nightcrawler, and Foxglen.
